Plot Observed Hermosillo Case Counts

Source: R/plot_observed_cases.R
plot_observed_cases.Rd

Creates a scatter plot of classical and hemorrhagic dengue cases for a selected subset of the Hermosillo study data.

Usage

plot_observed_cases(
  data,
  rows = seq_len(nrow(data)),
  title = "Observed Cases",
  ylim = NULL
)

Arguments

data

A data frame with columns week, classical, and hemorrhagic.

rows

Integer row indices to display.

title

Plot title.

ylim

Optional y-axis limits.

Value

Invisibly returns the plotted subset of data.

See also

Other hermosillo_analysis: load_hermosillo_2010_analysis_config(), plot_likelihood_surface(), plot_model_fit(), plot_profile_likelihood(), run_hermosillo_2010_analysis()
